content.text: I'll start by reading the issue context and fetching the announcement template.

content.content:
{"body":"Please provide as much information as you can:

* **GO term ID and Label**


GO:0045479  vesicle targeting to fusome [0 annotations]
GO:0010785   clathrin coating of Golgi vesicle, plasma membrane to endosome targeting [0 annotations]
GO:0048201  vesicle targeting, plasma membrane to endosome [0 annotations]

GO:0006903  vesicle targeting [12 direct EXP]
REPLACE BY => GO:0016192  vesicle-mediated transport

GO:0048199   vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi [2 direct EXP]
REPLACE BY  => GO:0048193  Golgi vesicle transport (IDEALLY THESE WOULD BE REANNOTATED TO A MORE SPECIFIC CHILD BECAUSE THIS TERM ISN'T VERY INFORMATIVE]

GO:0048207  vesicle targeting, rough ER to cis-Golgi [1 direct EXP]
REPLACE BY  => GO:0006888   endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport



* **Reason for deprecation** Put an x in the appropriate box: 
 - [x] The reason for obsoletion is that the term is not clearly defined and usage has been inconsistent.
 - [x]  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was added in error.
 - [x] These terms are redundant with other terms



----
Checklist for ontology editor

***Check term usage and metadata in Protégé***
- [ ] check term usage in the ontology 
- [ ] check internal mappings: RHEA, EC, MetaCyc
- [ ] check subset usage
- [ ] check taxon constraints 

***Check annotations***
- [ ] create Annotation Review spreadsheet 
- * Annotation Review template: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1izV3q1jnq_Ybg5MJ53O_b5BCTkGtjl_Fi-cOg3-7eBE/edit#gid=0
- * Instructions: https://wiki.geneontology.org/Annotation_Review_Request
- [ ] create annotation review ticket: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/new?assignees=&labels=annotation+review&template=annotation-review-for-obsoletion.md&title=Review+annotations+to+%5BINSERT+GO+TERM%5D
- [ ] find external mappings (via IEAS), include in obsoletion notice  
- [ ] tag curators in Annotation Review ticket. Responsible annotator for each group: https://github.com/geneontology/go-site/blob/master/metadata/group-contacts.csv

***Notification***
- [ ] create [obsoletion announcement](https://github.com/geneontology/go-announcements/issues/new?assignees=&labels=obsoletion&template=obsoletion-notice.md&title=Obsoletion+notice%3A+%5BGO+ID%3A+term+label%5D)
- [ ] announce to GO friends (go-friends@mailman.stanford.edu)
- [ ] paste the text in the ontology ticket

input.command: gh api repos/geneontology/go-announcements/contents/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(x['name'], x['type']) for x in json.load(sys.stdin)]"

content.text: This is a request to draft an obsoletion announcement (not to perform the obsoletion itself). Let me fetch the obsoletion notice template.

content.content:
---
name: Obsoletion notice
about: This template is to notify ontology users of a term obsoletion.
title: 'Obsoletion notice: [GO ID: term label]'
labels: obsoletion
assignees: ''

---

Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete [GO ID: term label]. 
(keep one, remove others): 

* The reason for obsoletion is that the term is not clearly defined and usage has been inconsistent
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the meaning of the term is ambiguous.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a GO-CAM model.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represent an assay and not a real GO process. 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this represents a phenotype.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using [appropriate GO term] 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term refers to a class of proteins.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was added in error.
* The reason for obsoletion is that more specific terms were created.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was an unnecessary grouping term.
* The reason for obsoletion is that is not known to be catalyzed by any gene product.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that it more specific than the specificity of any known gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that there is no evidence that this function/process/component exists.
* (or add other reason)

Annotations:
There are X experimental annotations to this term by (list of impacted groups and their respective numbers of EXP and ISS annotations). 
or: There are no experimental annotations to this term.

There are X InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to this term. 
or: There are no mappings to this term.

This term is included in the XXX subset(s).
or: This term is not present in any subset.

Annotations can be viewed here: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-annotation tracker].

If obsolete term has a 'replaced by' term: (optional)
This term is being replaced by [GO term] 

If obsolete term has a 'consider' term:  (optional)
Annotations can be transferred to [suggested GO term(s)] 

Any comments can be  added to the issue: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-ontology tracker]. 
Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks, 

The GO-Ontology Editors

content.text: I have the template. Let me gather accurate metadata for these terms from the ontology.

input.command: for id in GO:0006903 GO:0045479 GO:0010785 GO:0048201 GO:0048199 GO:0048207 GO:0048209 GO:0048206 GO:0048204 GO:0048203; do echo "=== $id ==="; obo-grep.pl --noheader -r "id: $id" src/ontology/go-edit.obo; echo; done
input.description: Get stanzas for all terms to be obsoleted

content.content:
=== GO:0006903 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0006903
name: vesicle targeting
namespace: biological_process
def: "The process in which vesicles are directed to specific destination membranes. Targeting involves coordinated interactions among cytoskeletal elements (microtubules or actin filaments), motor proteins, molecules at the vesicle membrane and target membrane surfaces, and vesicle cargo." [GOC:mah, PMID:17335816]
is_a: GO:0009987 ! cellular process
relationship: part_of GO:0016192 ! vesicle-mediated transport
relationship: part_of GO:0051650 ! establishment of vesicle localization


=== GO:0045479 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0045479
name: vesicle targeting to fusome
namespace: biological_process
def: "The recruitment of vesicles to the fusome. The vesicles become the fusome tubule network and are necessary for the assembly of the fusome." [PMID:9046244]
synonym: "vesicle-fusome targeting" EXACT []
intersection_of: GO:0006903 ! vesicle targeting
intersection_of: has_primary_input GO:0031982 ! vesicle
intersection_of: has_target_end_location GO:0045169 ! fusome
relationship: part_of GO:0045478 ! fusome organization


=== GO:0010785 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0010785
name: clathrin coating of Golgi vesicle, plasma membrane to endosome targeting
namespace: biological_process
def: "The addition of clathrin and adaptor proteins to Golgi membranes during the formation of transport vesicles that will move from the plasma membrane to the endosome, forming a vesicle coat." [GOC:dph, GOC:tb]
is_a: GO:0048202 ! clathrin coating of Golgi vesicle
relationship: part_of GO:0048201 ! vesicle targeting, plasma membrane to endosome


=== GO:0048201 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0048201
name: vesicle targeting, plasma membrane to endosome
namespace: biological_process
def: "The process in which vesicles formed at the plasma membrane are directed to specific destinations in endosome membranes, mediated by molecules at the vesicle membrane and target membrane surfaces." [GOC:jid, GOC:mah, ISBN:0716731363, PMID:10219233]
synonym: "plasma membrane to endosome targeting" EXACT []
intersection_of: GO:0006903 ! vesicle targeting
intersection_of: has_primary_input GO:0031982 ! vesicle
intersection_of: has_target_end_location GO:0010008 ! endosome membrane
intersection_of: has_target_start_location GO:0005886 ! plasma membrane


=== GO:0048199 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0048199
name: vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi
namespace: biological_process
def: "The process in which vesicles are directed to specific destination membranes during transport to, from or within the Golgi apparatus; mediated by the addition of specific coat proteins, including COPI and COPII proteins and clathrin, to the membrane during vesicle formation." [GOC:jid, GOC:mah, ISBN:0716731363, PMID:10219233]
synonym: "dictyosome vesicle targeting" NARROW []
synonym: "Golgi vesicle targeting" EXACT []
synonym: "vesicle targeting, to, from or within dictyosome" NARROW []
intersection_of: GO:0006903 ! vesicle targeting
intersection_of: has_primary_input GO:0005798 ! Golgi-associated vesicle
intersection_of: results_in_transport_to_from_or_in GO:0005794 ! Golgi apparatus
relationship: part_of GO:0048193 ! Golgi vesicle transport


=== GO:0048207 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0048207
name: vesicle targeting, rough ER to cis-Golgi
namespace: biological_process
def: "The process in which vesicles are directed to specific destination membranes during transport from the rough endoplasmic reticulum to the cis-Golgi." [GOC:jid, GOC:mah, ISBN:0716731363, PMID:10219233]
synonym: "rough endoplasmic reticulum to cis-Golgi targeting" EXACT []
synonym: "rough ER to cis-Golgi targeting" EXACT []
synonym: "vesicle targeting, rough endoplasmic reticulum to cis-Golgi" EXACT []
is_a: GO:0048199 ! vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi
relationship: part_of GO:0006888 ! endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport


=== GO:0048209 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0048209
name: regulation of vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi
namespace: biological_process
def: "Any process that modulates the frequency, rate, or destination of vesicle-mediated transport to, from or within the Golgi apparatus." [GOC:jid, GOC:mah, ISBN:0716731363, PMID:10219233]
synonym: "regulation of Golgi vesicle targeting" EXACT []
intersection_of: GO:0065007 ! biological regulation
intersection_of: regulates GO:0048199 ! vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi
relationship: regulates GO:0051641 {IAO:0000233="https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/13926"} ! cellular localization


=== GO:0048206 ===
[Term]
id: GO:0048206

content.text: I have everything needed. There's an open annotation review ticket (go-annotation#6424). I'll post the drafted announcement as a comment on the issue, based on the `obsoletion-notice.md` template with unnecessary lines removed.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/comment.md <<'EOF'
@raymond91125 Drafted the obsoletion announcement below, based on the `obsoletion-notice.md` template with the boilerplate reason list and unused optional lines removed. Two items need an editor's input before sending, flagged at the end.

---

**Title:** Obsoletion notice: GO:0006903 vesicle targeting and descendants

Dear all,

The proposal has been made to obsolete the following terms:

| GO ID | Label | Replaced by |
|---|---|---|
| GO:0006903 | vesicle targeting | GO:0016192 vesicle-mediated transport |
| GO:0045479 | vesicle targeting to fusome | — |
| GO:0010785 | clathrin coating of Golgi vesicle, plasma membrane to endosome targeting | — |
| GO:0048201 | vesicle targeting, plasma membrane to endosome | — |
| GO:0048199 | vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi | GO:0048193 Golgi vesicle transport |
| GO:0048207 | vesicle targeting, rough ER to cis-Golgi | GO:0006888 endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport |
| GO:0048209 | regulation of vesicle targeting, to, from or within Golgi | — |
| GO:0048206 | vesicle targeting, cis-Golgi to rough endoplasmic reticulum | GO:0006890 retrograde vesicle-mediated transport, Golgi to endoplasmic reticulum |
| GO:0048204 | vesicle targeting, inter-Golgi cisterna | GO:0048219 inter-Golgi cisterna vesicle-mediated transport |
| GO:0048203 | vesicle targeting, trans-Golgi to endosome | GO:0006895 Golgi to endosome transport |

The reason for obsoletion is that these "vesicle targeting" terms are redundant with the corresponding "vesicle-mediated transport" terms; the targeting/transport distinction was not applied consistently and the terms are not clearly defined.

Annotations:
There are experimental annotations to GO:0006903 (12 direct EXP), GO:0048199 (2 direct EXP) and GO:0048207 (1 direct EXP). GO:0048209 has 1 TAS annotation. The remaining terms (GO:0045479, GO:0010785, GO:0048201, GO:0048206, GO:0048204, GO:0048203) have no annotations. The per-group breakdown is in the annotation review ticket below.

There are no InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to these terms.

These terms are not present in any subset.

Annotations can be viewed here: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6424

Replacement terms are listed in the table above. Where no replacement is given, annotations will be reviewed and moved to an appropriate term as part of the annotation review.

Any comments can be added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31865
Unless objections are received by **[DATE]**, we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks,

The GO-Ontology Editors

---

**Before sending, please confirm/fill:**
1. **Objection deadline** — suggest **2026-05-30** (two weeks out); adjust as needed.
2. **Mappings and subsets** — I verified no `subset:` tags on any of the ten stanzas in `go-edit.obo`. I did not independently verify external IEA mappings (InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW); the issue checklist still has "find external mappings (via IEAs)" unchecked, so please confirm the no-mappings line.

I've left this as a draft only — say the word and I can open the announcement issue in `go-announcements` using this text.

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25948117154)
EOF
gh issue comment 31865 --body-file /tmp/comment.md
input.description: Post drafted announcement as comment on issue 31865

content.text:
Done. This was a drafting request only — no ontology edits required, so no branch or PR.

Posted the drafted obsoletion announcement as a [comment on issue #31865](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31865#issuecomment-4464789837).

Summary of what I did:
- Fetched the `obsoletion-notice.md` template from `go-announcements`.
- Pulled the ten term stanzas from `go-edit.obo` to verify labels, replacements, and subset membership (none have `subset:` tags).
- Found the open annotation review ticket — go-annotation#6424 — and linked it.
- Filled the template into a single combined announcement covering all ten terms (replacements in a table), and stripped the boilerplate reason list and unused optional lines per the request.
- Flagged two items for an editor to confirm before sending: the objection deadline (suggested 2026-05-30) and the external IEA mappings line (unverified; the issue checklist still has that step open).

I deliberately did not create the announcement issue in `go-announcements` itself, since the request was to draft it — offered to open it on request.
